reviews.author: Josh Hughes
reviews.text: Very satisfied with this company.  I reached out and he showed up as planned and had our concrete poured within a few days.  Excellent work and will be calling them back for our next projects .

reviews.author: Rory Foster
reviews.text: Maurice and his crew were true professionals.  Outstanding communication about every aspect of the project.  Will highly recommend for your masonry needs.

reviews.author: Wanda Garland
reviews.text: Maurice did a wonderful job on my screened in porch, patio and pergola. I could not imagine that anyone could have done a better job! He was very considerate of my yard and did an excellent job! I would highly recommend him!!!

reviews.author: Matt Barker
reviews.text: Highly recommend using their services. Very easy to communicate with and very knowledgable. Got the work done when they said and did it well. Was a pleasure to work with. Found my concrete contractor.

reviews.author: James Bruinsma
reviews.text:
We hired Maurice to pour a 20' x 20' concrete pad for our carport. He came out very quickly, assessed and gave us an estimate of cost and time. He came out a few days later and started work immediately. The only slight delay for the entire job was the concrete truck availability 2 day delay). They poured the concrete the day before Christmas Eve. He has VERY reasonable rates and does incredible work! Maurice is very friendly, trustworthy and personable.
HIGHLY recommend him for your next job!
